_comment: Copy to creds.local.json (gitignored) and fill in. Env vars override these.
WA_PHONE_NUMBER_ID: from Meta > WhatsApp > API Setup (Phone number ID)
WA_TOKEN: permanent System User access token from Meta Business settings
WA_VERIFY_TOKEN: medinity-verify (any string; enter the same one in Meta webhook setup)
WA_APP_SECRET: optional: app secret to verify inbound webhook signatures
